# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **CPU raster regression fix**

## Highlights

Restores the legacy shader context to fix a CPU raster rendering regression introduced in m151.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Bug Fixes

- **CPU raster rendering regression fixed** — Restores SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT, which was inadvertently dropped during the m151 sync, causing the CPU raster backend to produce incorrect output. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))
